name: Garlic-Roasted Potatoes and Greens
recipeIngredient: 4 cup Watercress Sprigs, rinsed and crisped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix potatoes, garlic, and oil in a 10 x 15-inch rimmed pan.
2. Bake at 450°F until well browned, about 1 1/4 hours.
3. Turn vegetables with a wide spatula every 10-15 minutes.
4. Pour vinegar into the pan, scraping with spatula to release browned bits and mix with potatoes.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour potatoes into a wide, shallow bowl.
7. Chop half the watercress and mix with potatoes.
8. Tuck remaining watercress around potatoes and sprinkle with chives.
